# Durable Decision Template

Use after `/plan` records a user-approved durable decision, or after `/reflect`
discovers an unrecorded durable decision. Do not use this for reusable lessons or
session summaries.

## Decision

<The settled choice.>

## Date

YYYY-MM-DD

## Scope

<Repository, subsystem, runtime, release, or other boundary.>

## Rationale

<Why this choice won for this scope.>

## Alternatives Rejected

- <Alternative>: <reason rejected>
- <Alternative>: <reason rejected>

## Reversal Conditions

<What evidence or changed constraint would justify revisiting this decision?>
